metadata.policy_scope: Track 3 Conduit contract versioning and migration governance
metadata.boundary: Local Conduit versioning policy only. This file does not create runtime behavior, public UI wiring, backend behavior, authentication, database use, persistence, ledger behavior, model execution, live orchestration, Palisade, Weave, multi-Vault runtime support, production operation, customer deployment, or certification.

artifacts.role: Interface Layer boundary, deterministic identity expectations, verdict and release eligibility semantics
Local pinned NEXUS adapter boundary and fail-closed category surface
Local report schema, failure category coverage, trace boundary, and claim boundary invariants
Ignored local evidence export selection and manifest requirements

validator_expectations: JSON policy and contract files must parse

v1 artifacts must retain false boundary flags for public runtime, public UI wiring, backend, authentication, database use, persistence, ledger behavior, model execution, live orchestration, Palisade, Weave, multi-Vault runtime support, and claim escalation
verdict semantics must remain pass, fail, and escalate unless a major migration is proposed and separately accepted
release eligibility must remain blocked for fail, escalate, stop conditions, unsupported mappings, deterministic identity failure, trace boundary violation, and claim boundary violation
.track3-runs/ artifacts must remain ignored and uncommitted

propagation_requirements.facade_input_acceptance: surface, claim_id, requested_action, evidence_state, threshold states, operator_authorization_state, and current_repository_state_basis must be accepted before evaluation.
propagation_requirements.workspace_tenant_context: workspace and tenant context must be carried inside current_repository_state_basis until a runtime adapter gives them explicit fields.
propagation_requirements.evidence_state: evidence_state must carry current_evidence, required_evidence, missing_evidence, denied_claims, and evidence_notes.
propagation_requirements.authorization_state: operator_authorization_state must carry status, review_required, and review_reason.
propagation_requirements.operator_review: requires_operator_review must block advancement unless claim-specific approval evidence exists.
propagation_requirements.runtime_status: runtime_enforcement_status must be propagated and runtime_enforcement_unavailable must prohibit runtime claims.
propagation_requirements.vault_nexus_handoff: handoff may reference the accepted pinned Vault/NEXUS contract but must not imply execution.

patch.description: Clarifying documentation or validator checks that do not alter contract semantics.
allowed_examples: tighten validation of an existing invariant
fix typo or path reference without changing behavior

minor.description: Additive contract fields or additive failure categories that preserve backward compatibility.
allowed_examples: additional failure category that still fails closed
requirements: existing v1 reports and validators remain valid
new fields are optional or have bounded defaults
release eligibility and trace-boundary semantics are unchanged

major.description: Breaking schema changes or semantic changes to the frozen Conduit contract surface.
triggers: new supported Vault commit replacing the accepted pinned commit

migration_states.meaning: A contract or Vault change is described but not yet validated.
Static contract and local report validators pass for the proposed change.
The local import-adapter regression suite passes against the proposed surface.
The failure-injection suite passes and all injected failures remain release-ineligible.
The Operator has accepted the validated contract or Vault compatibility state.
A previously accepted surface is retained for reference but is no longer the preferred target.
The surface or Vault commit must not be used for accepted Conduit evidence.

stop_conditions: trace boundary treated as persistent ledger
Palisade runtime dependency introduced without authorization
Weave runtime dependency introduced without authorization
Facade runtime dependency introduced without authorization
